tasks.subject: [unified-status-strip] [P3] Update StatusShowcases and chat-sections registry for ChatStatusStrip
tasks.description:
Update the dev playground to replace `InferenceIndicator` and `SystemStatusZone` showcases with `ChatStatusStrip` showcases covering all 6 states.

## Modify `apps/client/src/dev/showcases/StatusShowcases.tsx`

### Import Changes

Replace old imports with `ChatStatusStrip`:

```diff
-import { InferenceIndicator } from '@/layers/features/chat/ui/InferenceIndicator';
-import { SystemStatusZone } from '@/layers/features/chat/ui/SystemStatusZone';
+import { ChatStatusStrip } from '@/layers/features/chat/ui/ChatStatusStrip';
```

### Replace InferenceIndicator Section

Replace the entire `InferenceIndicator` `<PlaygroundSection>` (approximately lines 101-157) with a `ChatStatusStrip` section showcasing all 6 states:

```tsx
<PlaygroundSection
  title="ChatStatusStrip"
  description="Unified status strip — one morphing container showing agent activity, system status, and completion summaries."
>
  <ShowcaseLabel>Streaming (live timer + rotating verb)</ShowcaseLabel>
  <ShowcaseDemo>
    <ChatStatusStrip
      status="streaming"
      streamStartTime={streamStart}
      estimatedTokens={1250}
      systemStatus={null}
    />
  </ShowcaseDemo>

  <ShowcaseLabel>Waiting for approval</ShowcaseLabel>
  <ShowcaseDemo>
    <ChatStatusStrip
      status="streaming"
      streamStartTime={streamStart - 5000}
      estimatedTokens={800}
      isWaitingForUser
      waitingType="approval"
      systemStatus={null}
    />
  </ShowcaseDemo>

  <ShowcaseLabel>Waiting for question</ShowcaseLabel>
  <ShowcaseDemo>
    <ChatStatusStrip
      status="streaming"
      streamStartTime={streamStart - 3000}
      estimatedTokens={600}
      isWaitingForUser
      waitingType="question"
      systemStatus={null}
    />
  </ShowcaseDemo>

  <ShowcaseLabel>Rate limited (with countdown)</ShowcaseLabel>
  <ShowcaseDemo>
    <ChatStatusStrip
      status="streaming"
      streamStartTime={streamStart - 10000}
      estimatedTokens={400}
      isRateLimited
      rateLimitRetryAfter={42}
      systemStatus={null}
    />
  </ShowcaseDemo>

  <ShowcaseLabel>Rate limited (no duration)</ShowcaseLabel>
  <ShowcaseDemo>
    <ChatStatusStrip
      status="streaming"
      streamStartTime={streamStart - 10000}
      estimatedTokens={400}
      isRateLimited
      rateLimitRetryAfter={null}
      systemStatus={null}
    />
  </ShowcaseDemo>

  <ShowcaseLabel>System message: compacting</ShowcaseLabel>
  <ShowcaseDemo>
    <ChatStatusStrip
      status="idle"
      streamStartTime={null}
      estimatedTokens={0}
      systemStatus="Compacting context..."
    />
  </ShowcaseDemo>

  <ShowcaseLabel>System message: permission change</ShowcaseLabel>
  <ShowcaseDemo>
    <ChatStatusStrip
      status="idle"
      streamStartTime={null}
      estimatedTokens={0}
      systemStatus="Permission mode changed to plan"
    />
  </ShowcaseDemo>

  <ShowcaseLabel>System message: truncated</ShowcaseLabel>
  <ShowcaseDemo>
    <ChatStatusStrip
      status="idle"
      streamStartTime={null}
      estimatedTokens={0}
      systemStatus="Response truncated — reached max output tokens."
    />
  </ShowcaseDemo>

  <ShowcaseLabel>Idle (renders nothing — height 0)</ShowcaseLabel>
  <ShowcaseDemo>
    <ChatStatusStrip
      status="idle"
      streamStartTime={null}
      estimatedTokens={0}
      systemStatus={null}
    />
  </ShowcaseDemo>
</PlaygroundSection>
```

### Remove SystemStatusZone Section

Remove the entire `SystemStatusZone` `<PlaygroundSection>` (approximately lines 159-182). All its showcase states are now covered by the system-message variants in the ChatStatusStrip section.

### Update the TSDoc

Update the component's TSDoc to reflect the new showcases:

```diff
-/** Status-related component showcases: StreamingText, InferenceIndicator, SystemStatusZone, TransportErrorBanner, TaskListPanel, ClientsItem. */
+/** Status-related component showcases: StreamingText, ChatStatusStrip, TransportErrorBanner, TaskListPanel, ClientsItem. */
```

## Modify `apps/client/src/dev/sections/chat-sections.ts`

Replace the two old registry entries with one new entry:

```diff
-  {
-    id: 'inferenceindicator',
-    title: 'InferenceIndicator',
-    page: 'chat',
-    category: 'Status',
-    keywords: ['inference', 'indicator', 'streaming', 'waiting', 'rate limit', 'timer'],
-  },
-  {
-    id: 'systemstatuszone',
-    title: 'SystemStatusZone',
-    page: 'chat',
-    category: 'Status',
-    keywords: ['system', 'status', 'banner', 'compaction', 'permission', 'ephemeral'],
-  },
+  {
+    id: 'chatstatusstrip',
+    title: 'ChatStatusStrip',
+    page: 'chat',
+    category: 'Status',
+    keywords: ['status', 'strip', 'streaming', 'waiting', 'rate limit', 'system', 'inference', 'indicator', 'compaction', 'permission', 'ephemeral', 'timer', 'complete'],
+  },
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `StatusShowcases.tsx` imports `ChatStatusStrip` instead of `InferenceIndicator` and `SystemStatusZone`
- [ ] `InferenceIndicator` `<PlaygroundSection>` is replaced with `ChatStatusStrip` section showing all state variants
- [ ] `SystemStatusZone` `<PlaygroundSection>` is removed
- [ ] Showcase covers all 6 states: streaming, waiting-approval, waiting-question, rate-limited (with and without countdown), system-message (3 variants: compact, permission, truncated), idle
- [ ] TSDoc on `StatusShowcases` is updated
- [ ] `chat-sections.ts` replaces `inferenceindicator` and `systemstatuszone` entries with single `chatstatusstrip` entry
- [ ] Keywords in the new registry entry cover the union of old keywords
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] Dev playground renders the new showcases correctly (visual review)

tasks.subject: [unified-status-strip] [P3] Run full validation suite and fix any remaining issues
tasks.description:
Run the full lint, typecheck, and test suite to ensure no regressions were introduced by the refactoring. Fix any issues found.

## Validation Commands

Run these commands in sequence:

1. **TypeScript type checking**:
   ```bash
   pnpm typecheck
   ```
   This runs TypeScript compiler checks across all packages. Verify zero errors.

2. **ESLint**:
   ```bash
   pnpm lint
   ```
   Verify zero new errors. Pay special attention to:
   - `no-restricted-imports` violations (FSD layer rules)
   - `jsdoc` violations on new exports
   - Any unused import warnings from removed code

3. **Test suite**:
   ```bash
   pnpm test -- --run
   ```
   Run all tests in single-run mode. Verify zero failures. Specifically verify:
   - `ChatStatusStrip.test.tsx` passes all groups (pure function, component, lifecycle)
   - No other test files reference `InferenceIndicator` or `SystemStatusZone` and fail

4. **Targeted test run**:
   ```bash
   pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/__tests__/ChatStatusStrip.test.tsx
   ```
   Verify all new tests pass individually.

## Common Issues to Watch For

1. **Broken imports**: Other files may import `InferenceIndicator` or `SystemStatusZone` directly (not through barrel). Search the codebase:
   - `grep -r 'InferenceIndicator' apps/client/src/`
   - `grep -r 'SystemStatusZone' apps/client/src/`
   Any remaining references must be updated or removed.

2. **Missing eslint-disable comments**: The new `use-strip-state.ts` hook may need eslint-disable comments matching the patterns in the existing `InferenceIndicator.tsx` for:
   - `react-hooks/refs` on `lastElapsedRef.current` / `lastTokensRef.current` usage
   - `react-hooks/set-state-in-effect` if applicable

3. **Unused imports**: After removing code, check that no unused imports remain in modified files (`ChatPanel.tsx`, `MessageList.tsx`).

4. **TSDoc requirements**: All new exported functions/types need TSDoc comments per `.claude/rules/documentation.md`.

5. **Prettier formatting**: Run `pnpm format` to ensure all modified files are formatted consistently.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes with zero errors
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes with zero new errors
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run` passes with zero failures
- [ ] `pnpm format` runs without changes (files are already formatted)
- [ ] No references to `InferenceIndicator` or `SystemStatusZone` remain in `apps/client/src/` (except in git history)
- [ ] All new exports have TSDoc comments
- [ ] The dev playground renders correctly with the new ChatStatusStrip showcases
tasks.activeForm: Running full validation and fixing remaining issues
